rules.name: prefer-startup-over-bootstrap-in-docs
rules.message: Prefer 'startup' terminology in docs; 'bootstrap' is retired for this workflow.

rules.name: retired-document-architecture-phrases
rules.pattern: document:\s*Scene|initial document|whole document|full document|current document's layout|document is provided externally|document (?:assembly|plumbing|model|builders?|building|contract)
rules.message: Use scene terminology for scene payloads, scene assembly, scene plumbing, scene builders, and the scene model.

rules.name: prefer-scene-in-user-facing-docs
rules.message: Prefer 'scene' in user-facing docs unless you are intentionally describing historical terminology.
